title: ABACBS and COMBINE 2025 in Adelaide
excerpt: Michael Menden shared highlights from ABACBS and COMBINE 2025 in Adelaide, where the group presented work spanning oncology multi-omics, ALS patient studies, psoriasis mechanisms, psilocybin and eating disorders, immune screening, gut metabolomics, rare disease research, and chronic fatigue syndrome metabolomics. He also presented recent work on Digital Twins, including DT-GPT published in npj Digital Medicine, and reflected on the group's strong presence across talks and posters, including presentations from Alina Arneth and Daksh Pamar.
